items.title: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
items.description: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

items.title: Fighter jet maker Saab smashes expectations as CEO urges procurement rethink
items.description: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

items.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
items.description: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

items.title: BP, ConocoPhillips to back Iraq with major investments as U.S. seeks to weaken Iran's energy hold
items.description: BP and ConocoPhillips are set to announce billions of dollars of new investments in Iraq on Friday.

items.title: Oil prices rise as U.S.-Iran hostilities threaten supply through Strait of Hormuz
items.description: Oil prices rose Friday as investors weighed escalating threats between the U.S. and Iran.

items.title: Seven & i shares end 3.6% higher on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
items.description: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.

items.title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
items.description: China will provide developing countries with 5,000 opportunities in AI training and seminar programs, as well as develop AI cooperation with various blocs.

items.title: World’s largest olive oil company says market has 'definitively' entered new phase
items.description: The update comes as analysts raise concerns about the prospect of global olive oil supplies swinging dramatically from one season to the next.

items.title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
items.description: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.

items.title: Trump doubles down on 2020 election claims in national address, alleging China meddling
items.description: Trump also repeated his calls for the Republican-led Congress to pass the "SAVE America Act," a controversial election bill that lacks support to pass.

items.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
items.description: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

items.title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
items.description: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.

items.title: Microsoft's Nadella criticizes Anthropic's Fable for being 'editorially controlled'
items.description: Microsoft enjoys close ties to Anthropic, but it's also working to help companies refine models that keep their data private.

items.title: Has Nike lost its 'cool' factor? LeBron James weighs in
items.description: Nike's stock has slumped as the sportswear giant faces new competitors and waning influence. LeBron James has some advice on how to regain its 'cool' factor.

items.title: Banking Committee's Sen. Rounds liked Warsh's 'tone' in first testimony as Fed chairman
items.description: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh was on Capitol Hill for two days of testimony this week.

items.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
items.description: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

items.title: AG pick Blanche to meet with Epstein survivors after 2 GOP senators hedge on nomination
items.description: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., wants Todd Blanche to meet with victims of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein before committing his support for the nomination.

items.title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
items.description: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.

items.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
items.description: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.

items.title: Here's a rapid-fire update on our stock portfolio, including the 5 names to buy
items.description: Jim Cramer and Jeff Marks offered their latest thoughts on the Investing Club's portfolio during the July Monthly Meeting.
